title: Shimmering Silver Happy Birthday Letter Foil Balloon Banner Kit (35cm) 1 Set - Perfect for Parties and Events
features: CELEBRATE IN STYLE: Elevate your party décor with our shimmering silver happy birthday letter foil balloon banner kit - 35cm, 1 set. The eye-catching design will surely impress your guests and make the event unforgettable.

ALL-INCLUSIVE KIT: Our happy birthday letter foil balloon banner kit includes everything you need for a fun and festive celebration. The set comes with a complete "Happy Birthday" letter balloon banner, making setup a breeze.

SHIMMERING SILVER DESIGN: Our stunning silver foil balloons add a touch of sophistication and luxe appeal to your party. Perfect for any age or theme, these beautiful balloons will make a bold statement at your next event.

PERFECT SIZE FOR DISPLAY: At 35cm in size, our foil balloon banner is not only visually striking but also the perfect size to be seen and admired by all. It's an ideal addition to any birthday celebration, whether it's a small gathering or a grand affair.

VERSATILE & REUSABLE: Our silver happy birthday letter foil balloon banner is perfect for any type of party or event, from birthday parties to milestones and special occasions. he sturdy foil material allows for easy inflation, deflation, and reusability.
description: From the manufacturer 14" Foil Balloon Banner Kits Take the stress out of decorating your special event, be blown away with these 14" foil balloon banner kits and give your celebration an instant lift!
